description_long: A group of apricots is scattered on a flat, light-colored surface, with each fruit displaying a round to slightly oval shape. The apricots vary in size and exhibit a range of yellow to orange hues, some with subtle brownish patches or spots. Their surfaces appear matte and slightly rough, with a natural, unpolished look typical of fresh apricots. The fruits are closely clustered, some touching and others slightly apart, suggesting they have been casually placed or spilled. No stems or leaves are visible on any of the apricots, and the skin shows minor blemishes and irregularities. The overall arrangement and appearance evoke a natural, freshly harvested quality.
description: A cluster of yellow-orange apricots with matte, slightly rough skin and minor blemishes, scattered on a flat surface.
description_view_0: Several apricots are seen from a low angle, emphasizing their round shapes and the clustered arrangement near the center of the surface.
description_view_1: The apricots are viewed from the side, showing their alignment in a loose row and highlighting the variation in size and color.
description_view_2: This view shows the apricots from the opposite end, with more separation between some fruits and a clearer view of their individual forms.
description_view_3: A side perspective reveals the apricots spread out in a line, with their yellow-orange tones and surface textures clearly visible.
attribute_blemish_pattern: minor brown spots and irregular patches
